ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Support the development of Advanced Canvas

ast.name: error
ast.source: Style attribute is missing the "key" property

ast.name: error
ast.source: Style attribute is missing the "label" property

ast.name: error
ast.source: Style attribute is missing the "options" property or it is not an array
ast.target: 样式属性缺少"options"属性或它不是一个数组

ast.name: error
ast.source: Style attribute is missing a default option (option with a "value" of null)
ast.target: 样式属性缺少默认选项（值为null的选项）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid JSON, repairing through Advanced Canvas:
ast.target: 无效JSON，通过高级画布修复：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to update metadata object in canvas file.
ast.target: 更新画布文件中的元数据对象失败。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error inserting rule from remote css

ast.name: error
ast.target: 加载远程样式表时出错

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the file format to export the canvas as.
ast.target: 选择导出画布的文件格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Higher pixel ratios result in higher resolution images but also larger file sizes.
ast.target: 更高的像素比会产生更高分辨率的图像，但也会导致文件更大。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will not include the fonts in the exported SVG. This will make the SVG file smaller.
ast.target: 这不会在导出的SVG中包含字体。这将使SVG文件更小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The theme used for the export.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will add an Obsidian + Advanced Canvas logo to the bottom left.
ast.target: 这将在左下角添加一个Obsidian + Advanced Canvas标志。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will obscure any text on your canvas.
ast.target: 这将遮蔽你画布上的任何文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will make the background of the image transparent.
ast.target: 这将使图像的背景透明。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Requires a reload to take effect.
ast.target: 需要重新加载才能生效。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: AdvancedCanvasEmbed: No subpath provided. This embed will not work as expected.
ast.target: AdvancedCanvasEmbed：未提供子路径。此嵌入将无法按预期工作。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Imported edge is not yet loaded :(

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Reload obsidian to apply the changes.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Metadata node not found or version mismatch. Should have been migrated (but wasn't).
ast.target: 未找到元数据节点或版本不匹配。本应已迁移（但未迁移）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No start node found. Please mark a node as a start node through the popup menu.
ast.target: 未找到起始节点。请通过弹出菜单将某个节点标记为起始节点。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Copied wikilink to node to clipboard.
ast.target: 已将节点的Wiki链接复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to copy wikilink to node to clipboard.
ast.target: 无法将节点的Wiki链接复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred while loading portal data. Please check console for details.
ast.target: 加载门户数据时发生错误。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Updating edges from portals is not supported yet.
ast.target: 从门户更新边尚不支持。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Creating edges with both ends in portals are not supported yet.
ast.target: 创建两端都在门户中的边尚不支持。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Core plugin "Properties view" was not found or isn't enabled. Enable it and restart Obsidian.
ast.target: 未找到或未启用核心插件"属性视图"。请启用它并重启Obsidian。

ast.name: description
ast.source: General settings of the Advanced Canvas plugin.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The type of node that will be created when double clicking on the canvas.
ast.target: 双击画布时将创建的节点类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, new nodes will be aligned to the grid.
ast.target: 启用后，新节点将对齐到网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default dimensions of a text node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default dimensions of a file node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The minimum size (either width or height) of a node.
ast.target: 节点的最小尺寸（宽度或高度）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The maximum width of a node. Set to -1 for no limit.
ast.target: 节点的最大宽度。设置为-1表示无限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the font size of e.g. group node titles and edge labels will not increase when zooming out.
ast.target: 启用后，例如组节点标题和边标签的字体大小在缩小时不会增大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add more commands to the canvas.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the canvas will zoom to the cloned node.
ast.target: 启用后，画布将缩放到克隆的节点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The margin between the cloned node and the source node.
ast.target: 克隆节点与源节点之间的边距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The step size for expanding the node.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make .canvas files compatible with the backlinks and outgoing links feature and show the connections in the graph view.
ast.target: 使.canvas文件与反向链接和传出链接功能兼容，并在图视图中显示连接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, you can link and embed a node using [[canvas-file#node-id]] (Use the "Copy wikilink to node" command to get an id).
ast.target: 启用后，您可以使用[[canvas-file#node-id]]链接和嵌入节点（使用“复制wiki链接到节点”命令获取id）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the node popup will show a button to copy the [[wikilink]] of the node for easy reference in other notes.
ast.target: 启用后，节点弹出窗口将显示一个按钮，用于复制节点的[[wikilink]]，以便在其他笔记中轻松引用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the file search will be done using the native Obsidian file search.
ast.target: 启用后，文件搜索将使用本地Obsidian文件搜索进行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically create edges between file nodes based their frontmatter links.
ast.target: 根据文件节点之间的前置元数据链接自动创建边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The frontmatter key to fetch the outgoing edges from. (Keep the default to ensure best compatibility.)
ast.target: 获取传出边的前置元数据键。（保持默认值以确保最佳兼容性。）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 创建指向其他画布的门户。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, edges into disabled portals will be shown.
ast.target: 启用后，将显示进入禁用门户的边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Group nodes can be collapsed and expanded to keep the canvas organized.
ast.target: 组节点可以折叠和展开以保持画布组织性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, a group that is collapsed show its border while dragging a node.
ast.target: 启用后，折叠的组在拖动节点时会显示其边框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Combine all style attributes of Advanced Canvas in a single dropdown.
ast.target: 将Advanced Canvas的所有样式属性合并到一个下拉菜单中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Style your nodes with different shapes and borders.
ast.target: 使用不同的形状和边框为节点设置样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add custom style settings for nodes. (Go to GitHub for more information)
ast.target: 为节点添加自定义样式设置。（前往GitHub获取更多信息）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default color of a text node. The default range is from 0 to 6, where 0 is no color. The range can be extended by using the Custom Colors feature of Advanced Canvas.
ast.target: 文本节点的默认颜色。默认范围为0到6，其中0表示无颜色。可以通过Advanced Canvas的自定义颜色功能扩展范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Style your edges with different path styles.
ast.target: 使用不同的路径样式为边设置样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add custom style settings for edges. (Go to GitHub for more information)
ast.target: 为边添加自定义样式设置。（前往GitHub获取更多信息）

ast.name: description
ast.source: When creating a new edge by dragging from a node, the edge will inherit the color of the node it is dragged from.
ast.target: 通过从节点拖拽创建新边时，该边将继承其所拖拽节点的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default color of an edge. The default range is from 0 to 6, where 0 is no color. The range can be extended by using the Custom Colors feature of Advanced Canvas.
ast.target: 边的默认颜色。默认范围为0到6，其中0表示无颜色。可以通过Advanced Canvas的自定义颜色功能扩展范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default line direction of an edge.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the edge style will be updated while dragging an edge.
ast.target: 启用后，拖拽边缘时边缘样式将更新。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the square path's corners will be rounded.
ast.target: 启用后，方形路径的角将变为圆角。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the A* path style will allow diagonal paths.
ast.target: 启用后，A*路径样式将允许对角线路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the A* path style will be rounded.
ast.target: 启用后，A*路径样式将变为圆角。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Floating edges are automatically placed on the most suitable side of the node.
ast.target: 浮动边缘会自动放置在节点最合适的一侧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow floating edges creation by dragging the edge over the target node without placing it over a specific side connection point. (If disabled, floating edges can only be created and used by other Advanced Canvas features.)
ast.target: 允许通过将边缘拖拽到目标节点上而不放置在特定侧连接点上来创建浮动边缘。（如果禁用，浮动边缘只能由其他高级画布功能创建和使用。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the "from" side of the edge will always be floating.
ast.target: 启用后，边缘的“来自”侧将始终为浮动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flip the direction of edges using the popup menu.
ast.target: 使用弹出菜单翻转边缘方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a presentation from your canvas.

ast.name: description
ast.source: If turned off, you can still set the start node using the corresponding command.
ast.target: 如果关闭，您仍然可以使用相应命令设置起始节点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default dimensions of a slide.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The padding of the slide when wrapping the canvas in a slide.
ast.target: 在幻灯片中包裹画布时幻灯片的填充。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the viewport will be reset to the original position after the presentation ends.
ast.target: 启用后，演示结束后视口将重置到原始位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, you can use the arrow keys to change slides in presentation mode.
ast.target: 启用后，您可以在演示模式下使用箭头键切换幻灯片。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, you can use the PgUp/PgDown keys to change slides in presentation mode (Makes the presentation mode compatible with most presentation remotes).
ast.target: 启用后，您可以在演示模式下使用PgUp/PgDown键切换幻灯片（使演示模式兼容大多数演示遥控器）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the canvas will zoom to the slide without padding.
ast.target: 启用后，画布将缩放到幻灯片而没有填充。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the zoom will not be clamped while presenting.
ast.target: 启用后，演示时缩放不会被限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, presentations automatically request fullscreen. Disable to keep Obsidian windowed during presentations.
ast.target: 启用后，演示自动请求全屏。禁用可在演示期间保持Obsidian窗口化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The duration of the slide transition animation in seconds. Set to 0 to disable the animation.
ast.target: 幻灯片过渡动画的持续时间（秒）。设置为0以禁用动画。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The intensity of the slide transition animation. The higher the value, the more the canvas will zoom out before zooming in on the next slide.
ast.target: 幻灯片过渡动画的强度。值越高，画布在放大到下一张幻灯片之前缩小得越多。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Change the persistent z-index of nodes using the context menu.
ast.target: 使用上下文菜单更改节点的持久化z-index。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, you can move nodes one layer forward or backward.
ast.target: 启用后，您可以将节点向前或向后移动一层。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Change the aspect ratio of nodes using the context menu.
ast.target: 使用上下文菜单更改节点的宽高比。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically resize the height of a node to fit the content.
ast.target: 自动调整节点高度以适合内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the auto resize feature will be enabled by default for all nodes.
ast.target: 启用后，自动调整大小功能将默认对所有节点启用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The maximum height of the node when auto resizing (-1 for unlimited).
ast.target: 自动调整大小时节点的最大高度（-1表示无限制）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the height of the node will snap to the grid.
ast.target: 启用后，节点的高度将吸附到网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Encapsulate a selection of nodes and edges into a new canvas using the context menu.
ast.target: 使用上下文菜单将选定的节点和边封装到新画布中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, the background grid will be hidden when in readonly mode.
ast.target: 启用后，只读模式下将隐藏背景网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Highlight outgoing (and optionally incoming) edges of a selected node.
ast.target: 高亮选中节点的出边（可选入边）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, incoming edges will also be highlighted.
ast.target: 启用后，入边也会被高亮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select edges connected to the selected node(s) using the popup menu.
ast.target: 使用弹出菜单选择连接到选中节点的边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select incoming or outgoing edges using separate popup menu items.
ast.target: 使用单独的弹出菜单项选择入边或出边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Focus on a single node and blur all other nodes.
ast.target: 聚焦单个节点并模糊所有其他节点。

ast.name: label
ast.source: Always align new nodes to grid
ast.target: 始终将新节点对齐到网格

ast.name: label
ast.source: Disable font size relative to zoom
ast.target: 禁用相对于缩放的字体大小

ast.name: label
ast.target: 启用.canvas元数据缓存兼容性

ast.name: label
ast.source: Enable support for linking to a node using a [[wikilink]]
ast.target: 启用使用[[wikilink]]链接到节点的支持

ast.name: label
ast.target: 显示进入禁用门户的边缘

ast.name: label
ast.target: 默认文本节点样式属性

ast.name: label
ast.source: Update edge style while dragging (Can be very slow)
ast.target: 拖拽时更新边缘样式（可能非常慢）

ast.name: label
ast.source: Show "Set Start Node" in node popup
ast.target: 在节点弹出菜单中显示"设置起始节点"

ast.name: label
ast.target: 包裹在幻灯片内边距中

ast.name: label
ast.source: Use arrow keys to change slides
ast.target: 使用箭头键切换幻灯片

ast.name: label
ast.source: Use PgUp/PgDown keys to change slides

ast.name: label
ast.target: 无内边距缩放至幻灯片

ast.name: label
ast.target: 演示时使用无约束缩放

ast.name: label
ast.target: 默认启用自动调整大小

ast.name: label
ast.source: Hide background grid when in readonly

ast.name: name
ast.target: 导出选中的节点为图片

regex.target: description: "When enabled, the node popup will show a button to copy the [[wikilink]] of the node for easy reference in other notes."

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the file search will be done using the native Obsidian file search."
regex.target: description: "When enabled, the file search will be done using the native Obsidian file search."

regex.source: description: "Automatically create edges between file nodes based their frontmatter links."
regex.target: description: "Automatically create edges between file nodes based their frontmatter links."

regex.source: description: "The frontmatter key to fetch the outgoing edges from. (Keep the default to ensure best compatibility.)"
regex.target: description: "The frontmatter key to fetch the outgoing edges from. (Keep the default to ensure best compatibility.)"

regex.source: description: "Create portals to other canvases."
regex.target: description: "Create portals to other canvases."

regex.source: description: "When enabled, edges into disabled portals will be shown."
regex.target: description: "When enabled, edges into disabled portals will be shown."

regex.source: description: "Group nodes can be collapsed and expanded to keep the canvas organized."
regex.target: description: "Group nodes can be collapsed and expanded to keep the canvas organized."

regex.source: description: "When enabled, a group that is collapsed show its border while dragging a node."
regex.target: description: "When enabled, a group that is collapsed show its border while dragging a node."

regex.source: description: "Combine all style attributes of Advanced Canvas in a single dropdown."
regex.target: description: "Combine all style attributes of Advanced Canvas in a single dropdown."

regex.source: description: "Style your nodes with different shapes and borders."
regex.target: description: "Style your nodes with different shapes and borders."

regex.source: description: "Add custom style settings for nodes. (Go to GitHub for more information)"
regex.target: description: "Add custom style settings for nodes. (Go to GitHub for more information)"

regex.source: description: "The default color of a text node. The default range is from 0 to 6, where 0 is no color. The range can be extended by using the Custom Colors feature of Advanced Canvas."
regex.target: description: "The default color of a text node. The default range is from 0 to 6, where 0 is no color. The range can be extended by using the Custom Colors feature of Advanced Canvas."

regex.source: description: "Style your edges with different path styles."
regex.target: description: "Style your edges with different path styles."

regex.source: description: "Add custom style settings for edges. (Go to GitHub for more information)"
regex.target: description: "Add custom style settings for edges. (Go to GitHub for more information)"

regex.source: description: "When creating a new edge by dragging from a node, the edge will inherit the color of the node it is dragged from."
regex.target: description: "When creating a new edge by dragging from a node, the edge will inherit the color of the node it is dragged from."

regex.source: description: "The default color of an edge. The default range is from 0 to 6, where 0 is no color. The range can be extended by using the Custom Colors feature of Advanced Canvas."
regex.target: description: "The default color of an edge. The default range is from 0 to 6, where 0 is no color. The range can be extended by using the Custom Colors feature of Advanced Canvas."

regex.source: description: "The default line direction of an edge."
regex.target: description: "The default line direction of an edge."

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the edge style will be updated while dragging an edge."
regex.target: description: "When enabled, the edge style will be updated while dragging an edge."

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the square path's corners will be rounded."
regex.target: description: "When enabled, the square path's corners will be rounded."

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the A* path style will allow diagonal paths."
regex.target: description: "When enabled, the A* path style will allow diagonal paths."

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the A* path style will be rounded."
regex.target: description: "When enabled, the A* path style will be rounded."

regex.source: description: "Floating edges are automatically placed on the most suitable side of the node."
regex.target: description: "Floating edges are automatically placed on the most suitable side of the node."

regex.source: description: "Allow floating edges creation by dragging the edge over the target node without placing it over a specific side connection point. (If disabled, floating edges can only be created and used by other Advanced Canvas features.)"
regex.target: description: "Allow floating edges creation by dragging the edge over the target node without placing it over a specific side connection point. (If disabled, floating edges can only be created and used by other Advanced Canvas features.)"

regex.source: description: 'When enabled, the "from" side of the edge will always be floating.'
regex.target: description: 'When enabled, the "from" side of the edge will always be floating.'

regex.source: description: "Flip the direction of edges using the popup menu."
regex.target: description: "Flip the direction of edges using the popup menu."

regex.source: description: "Create a presentation from your canvas."
regex.target: description: "Create a presentation from your canvas."

regex.source: description: "If turned off, you can still set the start node using the corresponding command."

regex.source: description: "The default dimensions of a slide."
regex.target: description: "The default dimensions of a slide."

regex.source: description: "The padding of the slide when wrapping the canvas in a slide."
regex.target: description: "The padding of the slide when wrapping the canvas in a slide."

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the viewport will be reset to the original position after the presentation ends."

regex.source: description: "When enabled, you can use the arrow keys to change slides in presentation mode."

regex.source: description: "When enabled, you can use the PgUp/PgDown keys to change slides in presentation mode (Makes the presentation mode compatible with most presentation remotes)."

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the canvas will zoom to the slide without padding."

regex.source: description: "When enabled, the zoom will not be clamped while presenting."
regex.target: description: "When enabled, the zoom will not be clamped while presenting."

regex.source: description: "When enabled, presentations automatically request fullscreen. Disable to keep Obsidian windowed during presentations."
regex.target: description: "When enabled, presentations automatically request fullscreen. Disable to keep Obsidian windowed during presentations."

regex.source: description: "The duration of the slide transition animation in seconds. Set to 0 to disable the animation."
regex.target: description: "The duration of the slide transition animation in seconds. Set to 0 to disable the animation."

regex.source: description: "The intensity of the slide transition animation. The higher the value, the more the canvas will zoom out before zooming in on the next slide."
regex.target: description: "The intensity of the slide transition animation. The higher the value, the more the canvas will zoom out before zooming in on the next slide."
